steps.title: Factor the target expression
steps.content: Notice that $-21 - 3x$ can be rewritten by factoring out $-3$: $$-21 - 3x = -3(7 + x)$$

steps.title: Substitute the given equation
steps.content: We know that $7 + x = 5$ from the given equation. Substitute this directly: $$-21 - 3x = -3(7 + x) = -3(5) = -15$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
